violations.description: IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the flour and ice.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice scoop holder microwave interior and ice machine interiors in downstairs kitchen noted not properly cleaned/maintained.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. Both chlorine and quaternary ammonia test strips are needed for testing various sinks and dishwashers.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Coke sliding glass door cooler door gasket noted not in good repair.
